# BootFile

> BootFile creates personalized AI instruction profiles based on how you think.

## What It Is
BootFile is a web app that helps people discover their AI reasoning style and generates a custom instruction profile they can paste into any major AI platform. It replaces the blank "custom instructions" text box with a structured, tested instruction set tailored to how the user actually thinks.

## How It Works
1. Take a free quiz (about 5 minutes total).
2. Discover your AI reasoning archetype.
3. Answer a few follow-up questions to personalize your BootFile.
4. Preview your profile, then purchase your full BootFile ($4.99).
5. Paste it into your AI platform of choice.
6. Every conversation from that point forward is shaped by your thinking style.

## The 8 Archetypes
- The Surgeon — "Cut the fluff." Direct, convergent reasoning. Wants precision and confidence.
- The Architect — "Show me the whole board." Systems thinking. Needs the full picture before acting.
- The Sparring Partner — "Don't agree with me." Adversarial-constructive. Wants pushback and challenge.
- The Translator — "Make it click." Clarity through analogies and simple language.
- The Co-Pilot — "Think with me." Collaborative. Riffs on half-formed ideas.
- The Librarian — "Give me everything." Comprehensive. Wants depth, sources, edge cases.
- The Closer — "Just tell me what to do." Action-oriented. Wants recommendations, not options.
- The Maker — "Less talk, more output." Production-focused. Wants drafts, code, and deliverables.

## What a BootFile Contains
- About Me — reasoning profile and thinking style summary
- How I Think — cognitive patterns and decision-making approach
- Communication Rules — how the AI should interact with the user
- Format Preferences — structural preferences for responses
- Never Do This — explicit boundaries and anti-patterns
- Quick Commands — trigger phrases for specific AI behaviors

## Supported Platforms
- ChatGPT (two-field Custom Instructions)
- Claude (single-block Profile instructions)
- Google Gemini (Gem or Preferences)
- Grok (two-field Personalization)
- DeepSeek (conversation primer format)
- Microsoft Copilot (condensed Personalization)

## Pricing
- $4.99 — one-time purchase, all 6 platform formats
